title: Fear the Nightfall
description: A world filled with mythic creatures...
body:
Welcome to a world filled with Vampires,Vampire Hunters and Werewolves!

This Modpack adds 3 different new factions: Vampires, Vampire Hunters and Werewolves and you can become one of them!

Each faction has its perks a bat form (vampires),very powerful weapons( vampire hunters), beast form( werewolves) and much more as each faction has got its very own skill tree!

Aside from that a few spooky biomes have also been added, as well as witch villages and blood magic.

Changes can also be seen in other places such as the enchanments, with a few new added.

Core Mods:

-Vampirism

-Werewolves

_**Note: I originally published this in Curseforge.Due to lack of mods this isn't the exact same modpack.You might notice a couple of mods missing**_

Here is the original modpack: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/fearthenightfall](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/fearthenightfall)
